items.speaker: Medulius
items.text: I pulled this girl out before the Tide could devour her. Don't worry, she's perfectly fine. Just unconscious.

items.speaker: Medulius
items.text: This girl once prayed for me too, did she not? A wondrous voice straight from the heavens! It even pierced through the Dark Tide that had engulfed me and gave me strength.

items.speaker: Medulius
items.text: I am a Senator of Septimont. Having been graced with such beautiful prayers, it's natural that I reward her. Now we're even.

items.speaker: Medulius
items.text: {PlayerName}, the more I become one with the Dark Tide, the more I understand your fear of it. I'll be taking my leave then. I'd better not make myself more of an eyesore to you.

items.speaker: Medulius
items.text: Let's each find a comfortable spot and watch the future of Septimont unravel. Hehe.
Medulius dissolved into a dark puddle, seeping into the ground like part of the Mournfell Canyon itself.

dialog.stepLabel: Bring Lenore to Septimont's Old District and inform Maji

items.speaker: Maji
items.text: Oh, {PlayerName}. You have no idea how grateful I am! Oh, and who might this be?

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: Hello. I am an Acolyte of the Order, Lenore. Any harsh work or dirty job you have, do feel free to send them my way!

items.speaker: Maji
items.text: Well, if you say so, {PlayerName}. Let's all do our part in restoring the Old District to its former beauty!
